summary: Sprint 36 — Digital Trophies regression. Backend pytest 21/21 PASSED covering catalog seeding (15 defaults + tier_colors), idempotent manual award (duplicate→400), admin CRUD (create/edit/soft-deactivate default/hard-delete custom), auth gating (client 403 on admin/leaderboard/revoke; 200 on own + portal), share-card PNG (1200x630, Pillow-openable, 404 on bad/revoked id), leaderboard structure, seen-flag mark+exclude, revoke removal from lists+share card, AUTO-AWARD on 10th checkout (client_regular), AUTO-AWARD on 7-day homework streak (client_homework_hero via backdated docs + complete hook). Frontend smoke confirmed: admin Trophies screen renders all 15 cards (6 dog + 9 client) with tier colors and Edit/Deactivate per card; '+ New Trophy' button present; Dashboard leaderboard widgets render (Top Dogs + Top Clients text present); Client portal shows TROPHY WALL section and NEW TROPHY EARNED celebration modal on load (multi-trophy queue working — modal showed Pack Builder with 'NEXT (1/3)' button).

issues: Spec says 'Sweet!' button marks seen; with multiple unseen trophies queued the button reads 'NEXT (1/N)' for the first N-1 then presumably 'Sweet!' on the last. Verified the modal renders + shows trophy name/recipient/description. Did not click through all 3 to confirm final-step copy in this run.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 4748 lines — well past the 700-line guideline; trophy endpoints should be moved to a dedicated router module (e.g. routers/trophies.py) for maintainability.

trophy_service._homework_streak_days computes streak by anchoring to today-or-yesterday but does NOT cap consecutive days; if a client logs heavy homework on a single day across timezones, completed_at ISO timestamps could land on adjacent dates incorrectly — current implementation looks correct but worth a comment about UTC date boundaries.
leaderboard endpoint returns empty owner_name when client lookup misses (uses 'or {}'); fine, but no fallback to client_id for debugging.

success_rate.frontend: smoke-verified — all critical UI elements present

test_credentials: Admin: admin@sithappens.com / admin123; Client: testclient@sithappens.com / test1234
seed_data_creation: Test backfilled bookings + homework rows tagged with _iter16_seed:true and cleaned them up at end of each test. Some auto-awards (client_regular, client_homework_hero, client_friend_bringer, client_pack_builder) for testclient were created during testing — client_homework_hero is cleaned up; others persist. Rocky still holds dog_star_of_day from main agent smoke test + dog_birthday was awarded+revoked during test (revoked row remains in DB with revoked=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trophy auto-award hooks for goal_score_5_count (training goal) and successful_referrals (referral hook) are NOT covered in test_iter16_trophies.py because main agent already smoke-tested the manual award equivalents and the referral hook is exercised by /api/bookings/check-out which we DO cover. The pytest file uses pymongo sync (not motor) to avoid event-loop issues — keep it sync if extending. test data prefix is _iter16_seed:true.
